cards.title: Claim Rules & Timelines
cards.content:
• Maturity vs. Death Claims
• Early vs. Non-Early Death Claims (3-Year Rule)
• Section 45 (Indisputability Clause)
• IRDAI Settlement Timelines & Penalties

cards.title: 1. Maturity & Death Claims
cards.content:
Maturity: Survival benefit. Requires 'Discharge Voucher'.
Death Claim: Paid to nominee on death during term.
Early Claim: Death within 3 YEARS of policy start/revival. (Strict Investigation).

cards.title: 2. Section 45 (Indisputability)
cards.content: A policy CANNOT be questioned on any ground (even fraud) after 3 YEARS. This is the ultimate protection for policyholders.

cards.title: Claim Settlement Time
cards.content:
30 DAYS from receiving all documents. 
90 DAYS for investigation (if needed for early claims).

cards.title: Delay Penalty
cards.content: Bank Rate + 2% Interest must be paid by the insurer if settlement is delayed.
